title: M. Valerius Chorton honoured as euergetes
support: Tardia refers to 'un marmo dimezzato', but no physical description is preserved.

provenanceFound._: First recorded by Gualtherus at Mazara 'in impluvio S. Caroli Oratorii D. Phil. Nerei apud Nic. Antonium de Federicis urna'
